From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Live music segment on Triple J

Radio show

Live at the Wireless

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Genre | [Live music](/wiki/Live_music "Live music") |
| Running time | * Sunday 7:00 pm (Triple J) * Tuesday 6:00 pm &  Saturday noon (Double J) |
| Country of origin | Australia |
| Home station | * [Triple J](/wiki/Triple_J "Triple J") * [Double J](/wiki/Double_J_(radio_station) "Double J (radio station)") |
| Hosted by | * Anika Luna (Triple J) * Caz Tran (Double J) |
| Original release | 1983 (1983) – present |
| Website | [Triple J](https://www.abc.net.au/triplej/live-at-the-wireless/) [Double J](https://www.abc.net.au/listen/programs/live-at-the-wireless-on-double-j/) |

***Live at the Wireless*** is the name given to live [concert](/wiki/Concert "Concert") and [festival](/wiki/Music_festival "Music festival") recordings captured by Australian national youth radio station [Triple J](/wiki/Triple_J "Triple J") and its sister station [Double J](/wiki/Double_J_(radio_station) "Double J (radio station)").[[1]](#cite_note-:0-1)

In the segment's earlier years, artists typically recorded their sets live in Triple J studios, before it shifted to capturing music at venues, which better expressed the crowd atmosphere.[[1]](#cite_note-:0-1) The Triple J live music and video team records, [mixes](/wiki/Mixing_console "Mixing console") and [masters](/wiki/Mastering_(audio) "Mastering (audio)") all sets.[[1]](#cite_note-:0-1)

Triple J have released several [CD compilations](/wiki/Compilation_album "Compilation album") of live recordings from the segment. In the age of [streaming](/wiki/Streaming_media "Streaming media"), many individual artists have released their *Live at the Wireless* recordings as albums, including [Middle Kids](/wiki/Middle_Kids "Middle Kids")[[2]](#cite_note-2) and [Ball Park Music](/wiki/Ball_Park_Music "Ball Park Music").[[3]](#cite_note-3)

## *Live at the Wireless 1*

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Live_at_the_Wireless&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Live at the Wireless 1")]

Recorded by the Triple team, compiled and released in 1983 was Triple J - *Live At The Wireless 1*[[4]](#cite_note-4)

1. [Private Lives](/wiki/Private_Lives_(band) "Private Lives (band)") - "Pleas"
2. The Particles - ("Bits Of) Wood"
3. Samurai Trash - "Samurai Stomp"
4. [The Go-Betweens](/wiki/The_Go-Betweens "The Go-Betweens") - "Hammer the Hammer"
5. [The Triffids](/wiki/The_Triffids "The Triffids") - "My Baby Thinks She's a Train"
6. Second Language - "Random Men"
7. [Do-Re-Mi](/wiki/Do-Re-Mi_(band) "Do-Re-Mi (band)") - "Bring the Hammer Down"
8. [Dropbears](/wiki/Dropbears "Dropbears") - "Lay Him Down"
9. Soggy Porridge - "You've Changed"
10. [Hoodoo Gurus](/wiki/Hoodoo_Gurus "Hoodoo Gurus") - "Dig It Up"
11. Idiom Flesh - "Ritual"

## *Live at the Wireless 2*

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Live_at_the_Wireless&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Live at the Wireless 2")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/8/83/Live_At_The_Wireless_2.jpg/250px-Live_At_The_Wireless_2.jpg)](/wiki/File:Live_At_The_Wireless_2.jpg)

Recorded by the Triple team, compiled and released in 1991 was Triple J - *Live At The Wireless 2*[[5]](#cite_note-5)

1. [Killing Time](/wiki/Killing_Time_(Australian_band) "Killing Time (Australian band)")- Holy Juice
2. [Ratcat](/wiki/Ratcat "Ratcat") - Skin
3. [Violent Femmes](/wiki/Violent_Femmes "Violent Femmes") - [Kiss Off](/wiki/Violent_Femmes_(album) "Violent Femmes (album)")
4. [Louis Tillett](/wiki/Louis_Tillett "Louis Tillett")- Long Walk Home
5. [Concrete Blonde](/wiki/Concrete_Blonde "Concrete Blonde") - Make Me Cry
6. [Faith No More](/wiki/Faith_No_More "Faith No More") - [Falling to Pieces](/wiki/Falling_to_Pieces "Falling to Pieces")
7. [Nick Barker & The Reptiles](/wiki/Nick_Barker_%26_The_Reptiles "Nick Barker & The Reptiles")- Miles To Go
8. [Pop Will Eat Itself](/wiki/Pop_Will_Eat_Itself "Pop Will Eat Itself")- [Def. Con. One](/wiki/Def._Con._One "Def. Con. One")
9. [Beasts Of Bourbon](/wiki/Beasts_Of_Bourbon "Beasts Of Bourbon")- Bad Revisited
10. [Falling Joys](/wiki/Falling_Joys "Falling Joys")- Puppy Drink
11. [Andy Prieboy](/wiki/Andy_Prieboy "Andy Prieboy")- [Tomorrow Wendy](/wiki/Tomorrow_Wendy_(song) "Tomorrow Wendy (song)")
12. [Not Drowning, Waving](/wiki/Not_Drowning,_Waving "Not Drowning, Waving")- [Albert Namatjira](/wiki/Albert_Namatjira#Legacy "Albert Namatjira")
13. [Archie Roach](/wiki/Archie_Roach "Archie Roach") - Charcoal Lane
14. [The Welcome Mat](/wiki/The_Welcome_Mat "The Welcome Mat")- Cake
15. [Mudhoney](/wiki/Mudhoney "Mudhoney")- [Touch Me I'm Sick](/wiki/Touch_Me_I%27m_Sick "Touch Me I'm Sick")
16. [Straitjacket Fits](/wiki/Straitjacket_Fits "Straitjacket Fits") - [Such A Daze](/wiki/Melt_(Straitjacket_Fits_album) "Melt (Straitjacket Fits album)")
17. [The Blackeyed Susans](/wiki/The_Blackeyed_Susans "The Blackeyed Susans")- Glory Glory
18. [Melanie Oxley](/wiki/Melanie_Oxley "Melanie Oxley") & [Chris Abrahams](/wiki/Chris_Abrahams "Chris Abrahams") - Benchtop
19. [Henry Rollins](/wiki/Henry_Rollins "Henry Rollins")- I Know You

## *Live at the Wireless 3*

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Live_at_the_Wireless&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Live at the Wireless 3")]

Recorded by the Triple team, compiled and released in 1993 was Triple J - *Live At The Wireless 3*

1. DEF Rhyme - Sex Be High
2. [Underground Lovers](/wiki/Underground_Lovers "Underground Lovers") - Promenade
3. [Matthew Sweet](/wiki/Matthew_Sweet "Matthew Sweet") - Devil With the Green Eyes
4. [The Truth](/wiki/The_Truth_(Australian_band) "The Truth (Australian band)")- My Heavy Friend
5. [Lucinda Williams](/wiki/Lucinda_Williams "Lucinda Williams")- Changed The Locks
6. [Throwing Muses](/wiki/Throwing_Muses "Throwing Muses") - Firepile
7. [Things of Stone and Wood](/wiki/Things_of_Stone_and_Wood "Things of Stone and Wood") - Share This Wine
8. [Skunkhour](/wiki/Skunkhour "Skunkhour") - Bootyfull
9. [Tumbleweed](/wiki/Tumbleweed_(band) "Tumbleweed (band)")- Sundial
10. [Headless Chickens](/wiki/Headless_Chickens "Headless Chickens") - Juice
11. [Belly](/wiki/Belly_(band) "Belly (band)") - Dusted
12. [DIG](/wiki/Directions_In_Groove "Directions In Groove")- Reinvent Yourself
13. [The Badloves](/wiki/The_Badloves "The Badloves") - I Remember
14. [The Sharp](/wiki/The_Sharp "The Sharp")- Train Of Thought
15. [Screaming Jets](/wiki/Screaming_Jets "Screaming Jets") - Here I Go
16. The Plums - Ride
17. [Chris Wilson](/wiki/Chris_Wilson_(Australian_musician) "Chris Wilson (Australian musician)")- The Big One
18. Faith No More - [Midlife Crisis](/wiki/Midlife_Crisis "Midlife Crisis")
